title: Policy: Policies Applied - Restart the app
scenario: Admin tenant device policies are not enforced or updated after restarting the Poly Studio Mobile app
steps: 1. Launch Poly Studio Mobile app and log in to the admin tenant with a device connected.
2. From the admin tenant, create a device policy that locks specific settings (e.g., ANC, Transparency Mode, Equalizer).
3. Close and re-launch the Poly Studio Mobile app.
4. Navigate to Poly Studio Mobile → [Device Name] → Audio Settings and verify that settings affected by the policy remain locked/disabled.
5. Close the Poly Studio Mobile app.
6. From the admin tenant, modify the existing device policy (e.g., unlock a previously locked setting or lock a new setting).
7. Re-launch the Poly Studio Mobile app.

8. Navigate to Poly Studio Mobile → [Device Name] → Audio Settings and verify that the policy changes are properly applied (e.g., previously locked settings are now editable, or newly locked settings are now disabled).
expected: After restarting the app, all device policies applied via the admin tenant are properly enforced. Settings affected by the policy remain locked/disabled, and any policy changes made on the admin tenant are reflected in the app after relaunch.
